title: Unshackled: 'Eric Ries Gave Us the Language. A Texas Town Gave Us the Proof.'
summary: Unshackled Ventures publishes a detailed essay tying the book's themes to the real-world story of Danny Hicks at Plantible Foods in El Dorado, Texas — arguing that early decisions about values, incentives, and structure are not soft inputs but architectural choices that determine a company's trajectory.
blockquote: Early decisions about values, incentives, and structure are not soft inputs. They are architectural choices. Purpose and performance are designed as one system.
